    "Highway 29 is one of the most heavily traveled roads in Napa County.",
    "The intersection of Main Street and Spring Street in St. Helena has been the site of numerous pedestrian injuries.",

    "The City plans to add bulb-out sidewalk extensions, rectangular rapid flashing beacons (RRFBs), and improved lighting to enhance safety.",
